reviews.comment:
Pasamos la noche en el motel, excelente. Colchones, ducha y la atencion del personal predispuesto a hacerte sentir comodo.

(Translated by Google)
We spent the night at the motel, excellent. The mattresses, shower, and the staff were very helpful and eager to make us feel comfortable.

reviews.comment:
UN DESASTRE ESPERE 1 HORA PARA QUE ME CARGUEN NAFTA Y ENCIMA SOLO ME RECIBIAN EFECTIVO BILLETE. SIN TICKET FACTURA . NUNCA MAS

A DISASTER! I waited an hour for gas and they only accepted cash. No receipt. Never again.
